name: Shattered Bark Shield
desc: Once deflected a thousand blows. Now just good kindling.

name: Bent Iron Standard
desc: The banner that inspired legions. Now it just looks sad.

name: Cracked Soulstone
desc: The soul inside got out. Probably fine.

name: Clouded Prism Lens
desc: Focused infinite mana. Now focuses nothing. Like most things.
